#  Access Recently Viewed Drawings (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * **_Tip!_** You can swipe up to view older revisions of the drawing.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on your iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Find and tap drawing you want to view.
  4. Tap the **Recent** icon to access a list of recently viewed drawings.  
  
![Drawings Ios Access Recently Viewed Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4cadc0ddc4e5ff8d3894b4e6d74fd1f8/26d8609756c3e6e409157e258ad28034/drawings-ios-access-recently-viewed-drawings.png?fm=webp)  

  5. _Optional_ _:_ Tap a drawing from that list to view the selected drawing.


## See Also
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
  * [View Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/view-drawings-ios)
  * [Email Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/email-drawings-ios)
title: Access Recently Viewed Drawings (iOS)
description: How to access recently viewed drawings on the Procore iOS app.
